projects.title: ScopeIntel - Attack Surface Management
projects.description: High-performance Attack Surface Management (ASM) platform designed to automate external asset discovery, infrastructure mapping, and proactive threat analysis using parallelized recon engines.

projects.title: ShOS - Shell & Operating System
projects.description: Built an educational operating system from scratch featuring a protected-mode kernel, custom bootloader, VGA text mode display, PS/2 keyboard driver, and shell with 20+ built-in commands including memory management routines (segmentation/paging).

projects.title: opSync - Real-Time Collaborative Editor
projects.description: Full-stack real-time collaborative document editor with CRDTs (Yjs), WebSockets, live cursor tracking, version history rollback, role-based access control, and integrated chat functionality.

projects.title: Campora OSS - Institution Management
projects.description: Developed a comprehensive software bundle for educational institutions, integrating academic, administrative, and campus management into a unified platform with a modular and scalable architecture.

projects.title: Moves - Medicine Delivery Service
projects.description: Full-stack quick-commerce medicine delivery application with searchable catalog, cart system, and admin dashboard. Selected as a finalist in Infosys TechZooka Innovation Summit Hackathon 2024.
